title: Senior Consultant — Life Sciences and Healthcare (.NET) [#1]
body:
About the role

Senior Consultant — Life Sciences and Healthcare (.NET) — Life Sciences and Healthcare. You will support transformation and sustainment initiatives in insurance policy administration, working in a hybrid with periodic travel to client locations model. Primary location / hub: Mumbai.

Key responsibilities
• Design and implement solutions using .NET / C# / Azure, following secure SDLC, code review, and agile ceremonies.
• Apply TCS ways of working: continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and delivery excellence.
• Partner with global stakeholders to translate business outcomes into delivery roadmaps aligned to insurance policy administration.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across TCS and client organizations (5+ member programs typical).
• Drive quality through unit/integration testing, observability, and production support handover.
• Contribute to estimation, risk management, and status reporting for senior leadership.

Required experience
• 8+ years of relevant IT experience in technologies aligned to .NET.
• Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (or equivalent experience).

Preferred
• Certifications in cloud, agile, or platform-specific credentials where applicable.
• Exposure to regulated industries and global delivery models is a plus.

Tata Consultancy Services is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes diverse candidates.

body:
About the role

Technical Lead — Life Sciences and Healthcare (Go) — Life Sciences and Healthcare. You will support transformation and sustainment initiatives in IoT and edge solutions, working in a remote-first with overlap to client time zones model. Primary location / hub: Chennai.

Key responsibilities
• Apply TCS ways of working: continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and delivery excellence.
• Partner with global stakeholders to translate business outcomes into delivery roadmaps aligned to IoT and edge solutions.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across TCS and client organizations (15+ member programs typical).
• Design and implement solutions using Go / gRPC / Kubernetes, following secure SDLC, code review, and agile ceremonies.
• Contribute to estimation, risk management, and status reporting for senior leadership.
• Drive quality through unit/integration testing, observability, and production support handover.

Required experience
• 2+ years of relevant IT experience in technologies aligned to Go.
• Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (or equivalent experience).

Preferred
• Certifications in cloud, agile, or platform-specific credentials where applicable.
• Exposure to regulated industries and global delivery models is a plus.

Tata Consultancy Services is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes diverse candidates.

title: SAP Consultant — Travel, Transportation and Hospitality (ServiceNow (ITSM, CMDB, Flow Designer)) [#50]
body:
About the role

SAP Consultant — Travel, Transportation and Hospitality (ServiceNow (ITSM, CMDB, Flow Designer)) — Travel, Transportation and Hospitality. You will support transformation and sustainment initiatives in customer experience platforms, working in a flexible hybrid — 2–3 days onsite as needed model. Primary location / hub: Ahmedabad.

Key responsibilities
• Apply TCS ways of working: continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and delivery excellence.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across TCS and client organizations (27+ member programs typical).
• Partner with global stakeholders to translate business outcomes into delivery roadmaps aligned to customer experience platforms.
• Drive quality through unit/integration testing, observability, and production support handover.
• Design and implement solutions using ServiceNow (ITSM, CMDB, Flow Designer), following secure SDLC, code review, and agile ceremonies.
• Contribute to estimation, risk management, and status reporting for senior leadership.

Required experience
• 4+ years of relevant IT experience in technologies aligned to ServiceNow (ITSM, CMDB, Flow Designer).
• Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (or equivalent experience).

Preferred
• Certifications in cloud, agile, or platform-specific credentials where applicable.
• Exposure to regulated industries and global delivery models is a plus.

Tata Consultancy Services is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes diverse candidates.
